description: BINTable is a card BIN/IIN lookup service that returns metadata such as card scheme, issuer bank, and country for payment card prefixes. It offers a web lookup tool and an API-backed account system with usage balance.
summary: bintable.com exposes one public developer integration surface: a REST BIN Lookup API at `https://api.bintable.com/v1`, documented with OpenAPI/Swagger downloads and authenticated by an `api_key` query parameter.
